title: 10 best herbal creams for bladder infection
description: Bee balm creams helps with bladder infection because of its natural antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The herb, also known as Monarda didyma, contains compounds like thymol and camphor that help to combat bacterial growth in the urinary tract, reducing symptoms such as burning sensations while urinating and frequent trips to the bathroom.
